description.value: Aura faint enchantment; CL 5th; Weight 1 lb.; Slot none; Price 2,500 gp DESCRIPTION This malevolent-looking doll is made out of cheap rags and embroidery thread and is stuffed with straw or sawdust. A creature holding or carrying the doll takes a â4 penalty on saving throws against witch hexes. Alternatively, if the doll is stuffed with the hair of a creature, any witch holding the doll increases the DC of her hexes by +2 when using the hexes against that creature. A doll used in this way does not cause the witch to take a penalty on her saving throws. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, bestow curse; Cost 1,250 gp
